2188100.name: RPGScenery - Dragons Lair
2188100.description:
The home of the dragon is located in a colossal cave surrounded by basalt rocks. At the bottom of the vast cave is some kind of harmful liquid, over which dwarf masters built a massive bridge sometime in the distant past. The bridge leads to a seemingly endless flight of stairs, on top of which the dragon sleeps its timeless dream on its hoard. Behind the dragon, a magical gate pulsates in the unlikely event that the dragon should have to flee or if the cave becomes impassable.

This DLC contains 5 battlemaps to help you to bring your TTRPG session to the next level
